title: Caption Contest
summary:
[]: Caption Contest Post by Karma Burn » Sat Sep 04, 2004 1:37 pm I've got an idea! I think we should hold a caption contest. Someone could post screen caps from the series and we have to caption them. The person who has the funniest caption could win...something... Any thoughts?

[]: Post by MongolSquad » Sat Sep 04, 2004 3:28 pm I would support this 100%.

[]: Post by Dave » Sat Sep 04, 2004 4:04 pm Where the hell is that image from ShoKenju?

[]: Post by max3000 »

chunks.content:
Article: Caption Contest
[]: Caption Contest Post by Karma Burn » Sat Sep 04, 2004 1:37 pm I've got an idea! I think we should hold a caption contest. Someone could post screen caps from the series and we have to caption them. The person who has the funniest caption could win...something... Any thoughts?

[]: Post by MongolSquad » Sat Sep 04, 2004 3:28 pm I would support this 100%.

[]: Post by Dave » Sat Sep 04, 2004 4:04 pm Where the hell is that image from ShoKenju?

[]: Post by max3000 » Sat Sep 04, 2004 4:20 pm EoE rofl!! lmao!!! Man, that was a good one.

[]: Post by Asuka Langley » Sat Sep 04, 2004 5:01 pm ShoKenju wrote: [img]I eat babies[/img]

[]: Post by ShoKenju » Sat Sep 04, 2004 5:14 pm Asuka Langley wrote: ShoKenju wrote: [img]I eat babies[/img]

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 04, 2004 6:28 pm Obviously. :roll: All I gotta say is if you do this, don't remote link from someone else's site. If you have an image you want to use, PM me with a link to the image and I'll put it in a directory on the server. Post un-captioned images, and then people can post their captions afterwards.

[]: Post by ShoKenju » Sat Sep 04, 2004 6:39 pm i wasnt. back when she made it i asked if i could have it. she said yes, i saved and hosted on my own site

[]: Post by Phaze » Sat Sep 04, 2004 8:04 pm Can I start?
